ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "imdb_rating" REAL /* IMDB rating of the movie */,
  "imdb_votes" INTEGER /* Number of IMDB votes for the movie */,
  "worldwide_gross" INTEGER /* Worldwide gross revenue of the movie in USD */,
  "estimated_budget" INTEGER /* Estimated budget of the movie in USD */,
  "profit" INTEGER /* Profit of the movie in USD */,
  "review" INTEGER /* Review of the movie (1 for good, 0 for bad) */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie poster */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie trailer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the movie */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_directors" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast_members" (
  "cast_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "cast_member_name" TEXT /* Name of the cast member */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the cast member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_cast" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "cast_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cast member */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the cast member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "cast_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin or user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the review (1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the movie (1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_metadata_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the column */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the column */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_metadata_history_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the column */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the column */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_history_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the review (1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the movie (1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "viewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie was viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_views_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (view, review, rating) */,
  "engaged_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the engagement occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id")
)
